nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Yellow-breasted fruit dove
nodes.summary: Yellow-breasted fruit dove（Yellow-breasted fruit dove，学名 Ramphiculus occipitalis），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: While it is listed as least concern in IUCN, it is declining due to habitat loss, hunting, and trapping for the illegal wildlife trade

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: While it is listed as least concern in IUCN, it is declining due to habitat loss, hunting, and trapping for the illegal wildlife trade

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has classified the species as being of least concern but the population is believed to be declining due to deforestation from land conversion, Illegal logging and slash-and-burn farming. This species also experiences hunting pressure for both meat and the pet trade

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Yellow-breasted fruit dove 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Yellow-breasted fruit dove 属于科 鸠鸽科。
